title: Lapis sculk trims (FIXED)
body:
Sculkified Lapis: The Trim Overhaul
Stop ignoring your Lapis! This pack re-textures Lapis armor trims to look like Sculk, making them one of the most visually striking options in the game. It’s perfect for those who want that "Important Trims" look without the classic Netherite grind.

"I made this because nobody uses Lapis... now you won't want to use anything else." - Me
